meta.title: Schedulaa Pricing | Launch on your own domain with automatic SSL
meta.description: Compare Starter, Pro, and Business plans. All plans include a custom domain with automatic SSL, plus booking and website essentials, with scheduling, payroll, and automation on Pro and Business.
meta.keywords: Schedulaa pricing, booking software pricing, payroll SaaS pricing, website builder plans

og.title: Schedulaa Pricing
og.description: Plans for every stage. Launch on your own domain with automatic SSL included on every plan.

title: Pricing that grows with you.
Launch on your own domain with automatic SSL.
hero.subtitle: Custom domains (TXT/CNAME) with automatic SSL are included on every plan. Start with Starter for website + booking, then add staff scheduling, payroll, and automations on Pro and Business.
hero.mediaAlt: Schedulaa pricing overview showing plans and platform map

promo.starterNote: ${{discounted}} / mo for first {{months}} months. Then ${{base}} / mo

list.name: Starter
list.description: Launch your branded website, take bookings, and manage client payments in one place.
features: Website builder with branded pages and templates.
Stripe payments, refunds, and payment history.
Public booking link and embeddable widgets.
Custom domain and automatic SSL included.
list.positioning: For solo professionals who need website, booking, payments, and basic client flow.

list.name: Pro
list.positioning: For small teams that need scheduling, time tracking, staff workflows, and payroll-ready reports.
list.description: Run day-to-day scheduling, time tracking, and team workflows from one system.
features: Role-based access for managers and staff.
Up to 5 staff seats and 1 location included.

list.name: Business
list.description: Connect client approvals, job execution, billing, costs, and reporting in one workflow.
features: Expenses, purchases, materials, inventory, and vendors.
Profitability, tax summary, and month-end review.
list.positioning: For service businesses that need estimates, invoices, work orders, field reports, expenses, inventory, and month-end reporting.

assurances.title: Transparent pricing, enterprise-grade platform
assurances.subtitle: Secure, scalable, and fast: launch branded sites, process payments, and automate payroll from one login.

items.title: No hidden fees
items.description: Simple Stripe-based pricing with predictable processing rates.

items.title: Switch plans anytime
items.description: Upgrade or downgrade as your team grows; your custom domain follows instantly.

items.title: Branded websites
items.description: Custom domains with TXT/CNAME verification and automatic SSL on every plan.

items.title: Enterprise onboarding
items.description: Guided setup for multi-location brands with tax and payroll mapping.

items.title: Role-based access
items.description: Managers, staff, and finance roles keep scheduling and payroll secure by default.

items.title: Global payments ready
items.description: Stripe Checkout with refunds, saved cards, and cross-border payouts.

ribbon.message: New: Custom domains (TXT/CNAME) with automatic SSL are included on every plan.

footnote.message: Custom domain + automatic SSL: included on all plans.

ctaBanner.title: Start your free trial - no credit card required
ctaBanner.description: Bring scheduling, payments, and payroll into one workspace with automatic SSL on your domain.

payroll.holiday: Automated holiday pay and accrual support
payroll.payslip: Payslip PDFs and payroll handoff files

compliance.t4: Canadian T4 and ROE export support

scale.multiLocation: Multi-location support (operational locations managed through departments)

whyTeams.title: Why teams choose Schedulaa
items: Booking, payroll, time tracking, and websites share one data model.
No syncing errors between shifts, hours, and pay.
Fewer compliance gaps from disconnected tools.

websiteDesignService.title: Website Design Service
websiteDesignService.description: One-time custom website design by our team. After purchase, we open a design ticket, collect your requirements, design your site, and publish it for you.
websiteDesignService.includes: Includes: design + revisions + publish. Domain purchase not included (we can help you connect your domain).

websiteSetupServices.title: Optional Done-for-You Website Setup
websiteSetupServices.subtitle: Every Schedulaa plan includes the website builder. These setup services are optional if you want our team to build or prepare the site for you.
websiteSetupServices.note: Schedulaa is the subscription product. Website setup is an optional one-time service for businesses that want launch help.

items.name: Basic Website Setup
items.bestFor: Best for simple websites with up to 5 pages.
items.description: A fast branded setup for businesses that want our team to prepare the site instead of building it themselves.
includes: Booking, contact, or quote form setup

items.name: Growth Website Setup
items.bestFor: Best for service businesses that need a fuller website with services, gallery, reviews, products, or quote pages.
items.description: Our recommended setup for businesses that want a stronger sales website, richer content, and better lead capture.
includes: Gallery, projects, reviews, and contact pages
Quote request or lead capture flow
Basic SEO and social sharing setup
items.ctaLabel: Hablar con ventas sobre Growth Setup

items.name: Premium Website Setup
items.bestFor: Best for larger websites, content migration, and custom refinement.
items.description: For businesses with larger content libraries, more pages, and more hands-on setup needs.
items.ctaLabel: Hablar con ventas sobre Premium Setup

quoteToInvoiceSection.title: Built for Quote-to-Invoice Operations
quoteToInvoiceSection.subtitle: Schedulaa Business helps service businesses manage custom-price work from first request to estimate, work order, field report, invoice, and month-end reporting.
bullets: Capture quote requests for custom-price jobs
Turn requests into estimates and invoices
Create work orders and assign jobs
Review field reports before materials or billing become final
Track expenses, purchases, inventory, and vendors
Prepare profitability, tax summary, and month-end reports

bestFor.label: Best for
bestFor.starter: Simple website, booking, and service catalogs
bestFor.pro: Teams that need scheduling and employee workflows

items.label: Automated holiday pay and accrual support
Payslip PDFs and payroll handoff files

planFinder.title: Find the Right Plan
planFinder.subtitle: Not sure which plan fits? Choose based on how your business runs, not just your industry.
planFinder.intro: Answer a few quick questions and we’ll recommend the right Schedulaa plan and optional website setup.

businessType.label: What type of business do you run?
businessType.helper: This gives us context. The recommendation is still driven by workflow and team size.

teamSize.label: How many people are on your team?
teamSize.helper: Team size helps separate solo, small-team, and operationally heavier workflows.

needs.label: What do you need to manage?
needs.helper: Pick the workflows you want Schedulaa to cover.
needs.websiteOnlyHint: Website only is a simple-intent option. If you choose another workflow, Website only is removed automatically.

websiteNeed.label: Do you need a website?
websiteNeed.helper: This determines whether we also recommend setup help.

options.label: Yes, I need a new website
Yes, I want to improve or move my current website
No, I only need internal operations

setupPreference.label: Do you want to build it yourself or have Schedulaa set it up?
setupPreference.helper: This only affects the optional website setup recommendation.

options.label: I want Schedulaa to set it up

pageCount.label: How many website pages do you need?
pageCount.helper: This helps us estimate whether your setup fits Basic, Growth, or Premium.

options.label: 1-5 pages
options.description: Simple website: Home, Services, Contact, Booking/Quote, About or Gallery.

options.label: 6-10 pages
options.description: Fuller sales site: services, products, gallery, reviews, quote/contact pages.

options.label: 11-15 pages
options.description: Larger site: multiple service pages, project pages, location pages, or richer content.

options.label: 15+ pages
options.description: Usually custom scope. Best handled through Premium or sales review.

options.label: I don’t know
options.description: We’ll usually recommend Growth, then confirm the scope before setup starts.

contentComplexity.label: Do you need content migration or lots of galleries, projects, or products?
contentComplexity.helper: This helps separate simple setups from heavier migration or upload work.

options.label: No, simple content
options.description: Logo, contact info, basic text, a few images, and normal service/product entries.

options.label: Yes, I have many images/projects/products
options.description: Large gallery, many portfolio items, many services/products, or heavy manual uploads. Usually Premium.

options.label: Yes, I need content moved from my old website
options.description: Migration from an existing website. Scope depends on how much content must be moved. Usually Premium.

options.label: Not sure
options.description: We’ll recommend based on page count and confirm the setup scope before work begins.

planFinder.setupScopeHint: Website setup includes page structure, basic content placement, and launch support. Large content libraries, custom copywriting, advanced SEO pages, or heavy manual uploads may require Premium or a custom quote.

final.title: Your recommended package
final.subtitle: You only need one monthly Schedulaa plan. Website setup is optional and one-time if you want our team to build the site for you.
final.startTrialNote: This starts the monthly Schedulaa plan. Website setup can be added separately if needed.
final.summaryNoSetup: Website setup: Not needed. You can build it yourself.
final.recurringNote: The monthly plan is recurring. Website setup is optional and one-time.
final.addLaterNote: You can add website setup later if needed.
final.reassurance: You can start with the monthly plan first and add website setup later.
final.activeSubscriptionNote: Requires an active Schedulaa subscription. Domain purchase is not included.
final.scopeConfirmedNote: Final setup scope is confirmed before work begins. Extra pages, large content migration, custom copywriting, advanced SEO pages, or heavy gallery/product uploads may be quoted separately.
final.noSetupDescription: Build it yourself with the included website builder. You can add setup help later if needed.

reasons.starter: Starter is recommended because you mainly need a website, online booking, contact forms, services, and products without staff scheduling or finance workflows.
reasons.starterFallback: Starter is recommended because your needs still fit a simple website, booking, and lead-capture workflow.
reasons.proScheduling: Pro is recommended because you selected staff scheduling and team visibility workflows.
reasons.proEmployeePortal: Pro is recommended because you selected employee portal and team workflows.
reasons.proTeamService: Pro is recommended because you have a team and selected service-business needs like online booking, contact forms, services, or products. Starter may be enough if one person manages everything and you do not need staff workflows.
reasons.proFallback: Pro is recommended because you have a team and may benefit from staff-facing workflows even if one person can still manage the basics today.
reasons.business: Business is recommended because you selected quote-to-invoice or finance-ready workflows such as quotes, work orders, invoices, inventory, reporting, or month-end review.
reasons.setupNone: You can use the included website builder and add setup help later if needed.
reasons.setupBasic: Basic is recommended because your site looks like a simple 1-5 page setup with straightforward content.
reasons.setupGrowth: Growth is recommended because your site needs a fuller structure with services, content, and lead capture.
reasons.setupPremiumLarge: Premium is recommended because your page count suggests a larger site with more structure and setup work.
reasons.setupPremiumAssets: Premium is recommended because migration or heavy content uploads usually need a scoped setup review.

guidance.starter: Need staff scheduling, employee logins, or team visibility? Pro may be a better fit.
guidance.pro: Need quotes, estimates, work orders, invoices, inventory, or month-end reporting? Business may be a better fit.
guidance.business: Best fit for quote-to-invoice operations, job tracking, finance-ready reporting, and more operational control.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Yes. Schedulaa offers a 14-day free trial so you can test the platform before continuing with a paid plan.

items.question: Do I need a credit card to start?
items.answer: No. The current trial flow does not require a credit card to create your account and start exploring the platform.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. You can cancel future billing according to your account billing settings or by contacting support.

items.question: Can I switch plans later?
items.answer: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade as your business changes.

items.question: Are website setup services included?
items.answer: The website builder is included with every plan. Done-for-you setup services are optional one-time services.

items.question: Does Schedulaa process payroll?
items.answer: Schedulaa helps teams prepare payroll-ready records, approvals, payslip PDFs, and export files. It does not replace a licensed payroll provider, accountant, or tax filing service unless a supported provider integration is used.

items.question: What is included with annual billing?
items.answer: Annual billing gives you the same plan features prepaid yearly, with about two months free compared with monthly billing.
